title: Switzerland vs Colombia summary: score, goals & highlights| World Cup 2026 round of 16
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
Switzerland knocked out Colombia on penalties at BC Place, Vancouver, Tuesday July 7, in the 2026 World Cup Round of 16.

Match ends, Switzerland 0(4), Colombia 0(3).

Penalty Shootout ends, Switzerland 0(4), Colombia 0(3).

Goal! Switzerland 0(4), Colombia 0(3). Rubén Vargas (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.

Goal! Switzerland 0(3), Colombia 0(3). Luis Díaz (Colombia) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.

Goal! Switzerland 0(3), Colombia 0(2). Cedric Itten (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the high centre of the goal.

Penalty saved. Cucho Hernández (Colombia) right footed shot saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland).

Penalty missed. Manuel Akanji (Switzerland) right footed shot is too high.

Goal! Switzerland 0(2), Colombia 0(2). Jaminton Campaz (Colombia) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.

Goal! Switzerland 0(2), Colombia 0(1). Zeki Amdouni (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.

Penalty missed! Still Switzerland 0(1), Colombia 0(1). Davinson Sánchez (Colombia) hits the bar with a right footed shot.

Goal! Switzerland 0(1), Colombia 0(1). Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the top left corner.

Goal! Switzerland 0, Colombia 0(1). Juan Fernando Quintero (Colombia) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the centre of the goal.

Penalty Shootout begins Switzerland 0, Colombia 0.

Second Half Extra Time ends, Switzerland 0, Colombia 0.

Fourth official has announced 1 minutes of added time.

Substitution, Colombia. Yerry Mina replaces Jhon Lucumí because of an injury.

Attempt missed. Jaminton Campaz (Colombia) left footed shot from the right side of the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Daniel Muñoz.

Attempt missed. Juan Fernando Quintero (Colombia) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Luis Díaz.
